entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The legume species studied for its response to CO2

entities.name: JG 11
entities.description: A specific cultivar of chickpea used in the study

entities.name: KAK 2
entities.description: A specific cultivar of chickpea used in the study

entities.name: ELEVATED CO2 CONCENTRATION
entities.description: Increased levels of carbon dioxide (550 and 700 ppm) used as a stressor

entities.name: AMBIENT CO2 CONCENTRATION
entities.description: Standard carbon dioxide levels (380 ppm) used as a control

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: The broader environmental scenario driving the study

entities.name: SHOOT LENGTH
entities.description: A physiological parameter measuring the length of the shoot

entities.name: ROOT LENGTH
entities.description: A physiological parameter measuring the length of the root

entities.name: NODULATION
entities.description: The number of nodules formed on the roots

entities.name: TOTAL CHLOROPHYLL CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of chlorophyll present in the plant

entities.name: NITROGEN BALANCE INDEX
entities.description: A measure of nitrogen status in the plant

entities.name: RNA-SEQ
entities.description: High-throughput sequencing used to profile the transcriptome

entities.name: QRT-PCR
entities.description: Method used to validate the expression dynamics of transcription factors

entities.name: OPEN TOP CHAMBERS
entities.description: The growth environment used to control CO2 levels

entities.name: DIFFERENTIALLY EXPRESSED GENES
entities.description: Genes that show significant changes in expression under different conditions

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTION FACTORS
entities.description: Proteins that regulate the transcription of genes

entities.name: GENE NETWORKS
entities.description: Interconnected sets of genes that coordinate biological functions

entities.name: SUGAR/STARCH METABOLISM
entities.description: Biological pathway involved in the processing of sugars and starches

entities.name: CHLOROPHYLL BIOSYNTHESIS
entities.description: Biological pathway for the production of chlorophyll

entities.name: SECONDARY METABOLITES BIOSYNTHESIS
entities.description: Biological pathway for the production of secondary metabolites

entities.name: GLOBAL TRANSCRIPTOME
entities.description: The complete set of RNA transcripts produced by the genome
